# Sage AI - Autonomous Community Engineer

> The GraphRAG-Powered Autonomous Agent for Discord.

Sage is an enterprise-grade autonomous system designed to orchestrate and manage digital communities. It leverages a hybrid PostgreSQL and Memgraph architecture, functioning as a Cognitive Runtime rather than a basic bot.

## Architecture Data

*   **Database Stack**: PostgreSQL (Long-Term Memory profiles & summaries), Memgraph (9-pillar GNN Social Graph for real-time PageRank and Dunbar layers).
*   **Infrastructure Context**: Sage retrieves context dynamically via tool calls rather than prepending massive raw transcripts.
*   **Capabilities**: Multi-Agent Orchestration, GraphRAG Community Management, Knowledge Graph Moderation, End-to-End Workflow Execution.

## References

*   **GitHub**: https://github.com/BokX1/Sage
*   **Technologies**: Discord API, Memgraph, PostgreSQL, Pollinations.ai.
